predicate_mappings.linked_configuration_change: {} is linked to the configuration change {}

preconditions: I can only open an incident case A if it is not the case that A is an open incident and it is not the case that the incident A is resolved
effects: Once I open an incident case A, it is the case that A is an open incident

assign_responder.description: assign a responder B to an incident case A
preconditions: I can only assign a responder B to an incident case A if it is the case that A is an open incident and B is available and B is eligible for A
I can only assign a responder B to an incident case A if it is not the case that A has an owner
effects: Once I assign a responder B to an incident case A, it is the case that B is assigned to A and A has an owner
Once I assign a responder B to an incident case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

unassign_responder.description: unassign a responder B from an incident case A
preconditions: I can only unassign a responder B from an incident case A if it is the case that B is assigned to A
I can only unassign a responder B from an incident case A if it is not the case that a runbook is scheduled for A and it is not the case that a change is prepared for A
effects: Once I unassign a responder B from an incident case A, it is the case that B is available

Once I unassign a responder B from an incident case A, it is not the case anymore that B is assigned to A and it is not the case anymore that A has an owner and it is not the case anymore that the signature of A is escalated and it is not the case anymore that A is ready for remediation and it is not the case anymore that A is awaiting approval and it is not the case anymore that A is in implementation in progress and it is not the case anymore that a change is requested for A

bind_alert_signature.description: bind an alert signature B to an incident case A
preconditions: I can only bind an alert signature B to an incident case A if it is the case that A is an open incident and the alert signature B is available
effects: Once I bind an alert signature B to an incident case A, it is the case that the signature B is bound to the incident A
Once I bind an alert signature B to an incident case A, it is not the case anymore that the alert signature B is available

unbind_alert_signature.description: unbind an alert signature B from an incident case A
preconditions: I can only unbind an alert signature B from an incident case A if it is the case that the signature B is bound to the incident A
effects: Once I unbind an alert signature B from an incident case A, it is the case that the alert signature B is available
Once I unbind an alert signature B from an incident case A, it is not the case anymore that the signature B is bound to the incident A

escalate_signature.description: escalate an alert signature B for an incident case A
preconditions: I can only escalate an alert signature B for an incident case A if it is the case that A is an open incident and A has an owner and the signature B is bound to the incident A
I can only escalate an alert signature B for an incident case A if it is not the case that the signature of A is escalated
effects: Once I escalate an alert signature B for an incident case A, it is the case that the signature of A is escalated

escalate_to_approver.description: escalate an incident case A to an approver B
preconditions: I can only escalate an incident case A to an approver B if it is the case that A is an open incident and A has an owner and the approver B is available
I can only escalate an incident case A to an approver B if it is not the case that the signature of A is escalated
effects: Once I escalate an incident case A to an approver B, it is the case that the signature of A is escalated and A is awaiting approval
Once I escalate an incident case A to an approver B, it is not the case anymore that the approver B is available

prepare_automation_playbook.description: prepare an automation playbook C for an incident case A with an alert signature B
preconditions: I can only prepare an automation playbook C for an incident case A with an alert signature B if it is the case that the signature of A is escalated and A has an owner and the signature B is bound to the incident A and the playbook C is available
I can only prepare an automation playbook C for an incident case A with an alert signature B if it is not the case that A is ready for remediation
effects: Once I prepare an automation playbook C for an incident case A with an alert signature B, it is the case that A is ready for remediation
Once I prepare an automation playbook C for an incident case A with an alert signature B, it is not the case anymore that A is awaiting approval

prepare_automation_from_change_ticket.description: prepare automation for an incident case A using a change ticket B
preconditions: I can only prepare automation for an incident case A using a change ticket B if it is the case that A has an owner and A has a ticket scheduled for B
I can only prepare automation for an incident case A using a change ticket B if it is not the case that A is ready for remediation
effects: Once I prepare automation for an incident case A using a change ticket B, it is the case that A is ready for remediation
Once I prepare automation for an incident case A using a change ticket B, it is not the case anymore that A is awaiting approval

link_alert_rule_to_incident.description: link an alert rule B to an incident case A
preconditions: I can only link an alert rule B to an incident case A if it is the case that A is an open incident and the alert rule B is available and B is applicable for A
effects: Once I link an alert rule B to an incident case A, it is the case that A is linked to the alert rule B
Once I link an alert rule B to an incident case A, it is not the case anymore that the alert rule B is available

unlink_alert_rule_from_incident.description: unlink an alert rule B from an incident case A
preconditions: I can only unlink an alert rule B from an incident case A if it is the case that A is linked to the alert rule B
effects: Once I unlink an alert rule B from an incident case A, it is the case that the alert rule B is available
Once I unlink an alert rule B from an incident case A, it is not the case anymore that A is linked to the alert rule B

link_configuration_change_to_incident.description: link a configuration change B to an incident case A
preconditions: I can only link a configuration change B to an incident case A if it is the case that A is an open incident and the configuration change B is available and B is applicable for A
effects: Once I link a configuration change B to an incident case A, it is the case that A is linked to the configuration change B
Once I link a configuration change B to an incident case A, it is not the case anymore that the configuration change B is available

unlink_configuration_change_from_inciden.description: unlink a configuration change B from an incident case A
preconditions: I can only unlink a configuration change B from an incident case A if it is the case that A is linked to the configuration change B
effects: Once I unlink a configuration change B from an incident case A, it is the case that the configuration change B is available
Once I unlink a configuration change B from an incident case A, it is not the case anymore that A is linked to the configuration change B

link_suppression_rule_to_incident.description: link a suppression rule B to an incident case A
preconditions: I can only link a suppression rule B to an incident case A if it is the case that A is an open incident and the suppression rule B is available and B is applicable for A
effects: Once I link a suppression rule B to an incident case A, it is the case that A is linked to the suppression rule B
Once I link a suppression rule B to an incident case A, it is not the case anymore that the suppression rule B is available

unlink_suppression_rule_from_incident.description: unlink a suppression rule B from an incident case A
preconditions: I can only unlink a suppression rule B from an incident case A if it is the case that A is linked to the suppression rule B
effects: Once I unlink a suppression rule B from an incident case A, it is the case that the suppression rule B is available
Once I unlink a suppression rule B from an incident case A, it is not the case anymore that A is linked to the suppression rule B

link_tag_to_incident.description: link a tag B to an incident case A
preconditions: I can only link a tag B to an incident case A if it is the case that A is an open incident and the tag B is available and B is applicable for A
effects: Once I link a tag B to an incident case A, it is the case that A is linked to the tag B
Once I link a tag B to an incident case A, it is not the case anymore that the tag B is available

unlink_tag_from_incident.description: unlink a tag B from an incident case A
preconditions: I can only unlink a tag B from an incident case A if it is the case that A is linked to the tag B
effects: Once I unlink a tag B from an incident case A, it is the case that the tag B is available
Once I unlink a tag B from an incident case A, it is not the case anymore that A is linked to the tag B

generate_mitigation_plan.description: generate a mitigation plan for an incident case A using a mitigation runbook B with an alert rule C and a configuration change D
preconditions: I can only generate a mitigation plan for an incident case A using a mitigation runbook B with an alert rule C and a configuration change D if it is the case that A has an owner and A is linked to the alert rule C and A is linked to the configuration change D and the runbook B is available and B is applicable for A
I can only generate a mitigation plan for an incident case A using a mitigation runbook B with an alert rule C and a configuration change D if it is not the case that a runbook is scheduled for A
effects: Once I generate a mitigation plan for an incident case A using a mitigation runbook B with an alert rule C and a configuration change D, it is the case that A is linked to the mitigation runbook B and a runbook is scheduled for A
Once I generate a mitigation plan for an incident case A using a mitigation runbook B with an alert rule C and a configuration change D, it is not the case anymore that the runbook B is available

generate_mitigation_with_rollback.description: generate a mitigation plan with rollback for an incident case A using a mitigation runbook B, a suppression rule C, and a rollback plan D
preconditions: I can only generate a mitigation plan with rollback for an incident case A using a mitigation runbook B, a suppression rule C, and a rollback plan D if it is the case that A has an owner and A is linked to the suppression rule C and the rollback plan D is available and the runbook B is available and B is applicable for A and D is applicable for A

I can only generate a mitigation plan with rollback for an incident case A using a mitigation runbook B, a suppression rule C, and a rollback plan D if it is not the case that a runbook is scheduled for A
effects: Once I generate a mitigation plan with rollback for an incident case A using a mitigation runbook B, a suppression rule C, and a rollback plan D, it is the case that A is linked to the mitigation runbook B and a runbook is scheduled for A and a change is requested for A and A is awaiting approval

Once I generate a mitigation plan with rollback for an incident case A using a mitigation runbook B, a suppression rule C, and a rollback plan D, it is not the case anymore that the runbook B is available and it is not the case anymore that the rollback plan D is available

validate_change_prerequisites.description: validate change prerequisites for an incident case A using an alert rule B and a configuration change C
preconditions: I can only validate change prerequisites for an incident case A using an alert rule B and a configuration change C if it is the case that a runbook is scheduled for A and a change is requested for A and A is linked to the alert rule B and A is linked to the configuration change C
effects: Once I validate change prerequisites for an incident case A using an alert rule B and a configuration change C, it is not the case anymore that a change is requested for A and it is not the case anymore that A is awaiting approval

record_change_approval.description: record change approval for an incident case A using an alert rule B, a configuration change C, and a human team D
preconditions: I can only record change approval for an incident case A using an alert rule B, a configuration change C, and a human team D if it is the case that A is ready for remediation and a runbook is scheduled for A and A is linked to the alert rule B and A is linked to the configuration change C and A is bound to D

I can only record change approval for an incident case A using an alert rule B, a configuration change C, and a human team D if it is not the case that A is awaiting approval and it is not the case that a change is prepared for A
effects: Once I record change approval for an incident case A using an alert rule B, a configuration change C, and a human team D, it is the case that a change is prepared for A

record_change_approval_with_automation_i.description: record change approval for an incident case A using a suppression rule B, a tag C, and an automation identity D
preconditions: I can only record change approval for an incident case A using a suppression rule B, a tag C, and an automation identity D if it is the case that A is ready for remediation and a runbook is scheduled for A and A is linked to the suppression rule B and A is linked to the tag C and A is bound to D
I can only record change approval for an incident case A using a suppression rule B, a tag C, and an automation identity D if it is not the case that a change is prepared for A
effects: Once I record change approval for an incident case A using a suppression rule B, a tag C, and an automation identity D, it is the case that a change is prepared for A and A is awaiting approval

start_implementation.description: start implementation for an incident case A using an alert rule B and a configuration change C
preconditions: I can only start implementation for an incident case A using an alert rule B and a configuration change C if it is the case that a change is prepared for A and A is awaiting approval and A is linked to the alert rule B and A is linked to the configuration change C
effects: Once I start implementation for an incident case A using an alert rule B and a configuration change C, it is the case that A is in implementation in progress

Once I start implementation for an incident case A using an alert rule B and a configuration change C, it is not the case anymore that A is awaiting approval and it is not the case anymore that A is ready for remediation and it is not the case anymore that a change is requested for A

execute_automation_playbook.description: execute an automation playbook C for an incident case A with an alert signature B
preconditions: I can only execute an automation playbook C for an incident case A with an alert signature B if it is the case that A is in implementation in progress and a change is prepared for A and A has an owner and the signature B is bound to the incident A and the playbook C is available
I can only execute an automation playbook C for an incident case A with an alert signature B if it is not the case that A is ready for remediation
effects: Once I execute an automation playbook C for an incident case A with an alert signature B, it is the case that A is ready for remediation

mark_ticket_pending.description: mark the ticket for an incident case A as pending with an alert signature B
preconditions: I can only mark the ticket for an incident case A as pending with an alert signature B if it is the case that a change is prepared for A and A is ready for remediation and the signature B is bound to the incident A

I can only mark the ticket for an incident case A as pending with an alert signature B if it is not the case that A is awaiting approval and it is not the case that the incident ticket for A is pending
effects: Once I mark the ticket for an incident case A as pending with an alert signature B, it is the case that the incident ticket for A is pending

mark_ticket_pending_with_approver.description: mark the ticket for an incident case A as pending with an approver B
preconditions: I can only mark the ticket for an incident case A as pending with an approver B if it is the case that a change is prepared for A and A is ready for remediation and the approver B is available
I can only mark the ticket for an incident case A as pending with an approver B if it is not the case that A is awaiting approval and it is not the case that the incident ticket for A is pending
effects: Once I mark the ticket for an incident case A as pending with an approver B, it is the case that the incident ticket for A is pending
Once I mark the ticket for an incident case A as pending with an approver B, it is not the case anymore that the approver B is available

bind_change_ticket_to_incident.description: bind a change ticket B to an incident case A
preconditions: I can only bind a change ticket B to an incident case A if it is the case that the incident ticket for A is pending and the change ticket B is available and B is applicable to the incident A
effects: Once I bind a change ticket B to an incident case A, it is the case that A is bound to B
Once I bind a change ticket B to an incident case A, it is not the case anymore that the change ticket B is available

schedule_change_ticket.description: schedule a change ticket C for an incident origin A with an incident variant B
preconditions: I can only schedule a change ticket C for an incident origin A with an incident variant B if it is the case that A is an open incident and the origin is verified for A and A has an origin ticket link to C and B is bound to C
I can only schedule a change ticket C for an incident origin A with an incident variant B if it is not the case that A has a ticket scheduled for C
effects: Once I schedule a change ticket C for an incident origin A with an incident variant B, it is the case that A has a ticket scheduled for C

record_execution_observation.description: record execution observation for an incident case A using an alert signature B and an automation playbook C
preconditions: I can only record execution observation for an incident case A using an alert signature B and an automation playbook C if it is the case that A is an open incident and the origin is verified for A and A is ready for remediation and the incident ticket for A is pending and the signature B is bound to the incident A and the playbook C is available
I can only record execution observation for an incident case A using an alert signature B and an automation playbook C if it is not the case that A has an implementation observed
effects: Once I record execution observation for an incident case A using an alert signature B and an automation playbook C, it is the case that A has an implementation observed

close_incident_standard.description: close incident an incident case A using standard procedure
preconditions: I can only close incident an incident case A using standard procedure if it is the case that auto close is allowed for A and A is an open incident and A has an owner and a runbook is scheduled for A and a change is prepared for A and the incident ticket for A is pending and A is ready for remediation
I can only close incident an incident case A using standard procedure if it is not the case that the incident A is resolved
effects: Once I close incident an incident case A using standard procedure, it is the case that the incident A is resolved

close_incident_with_ticket.description: close incident an incident case A with a change ticket B
preconditions: I can only close incident an incident case A with a change ticket B if it is the case that the origin is verified for A and A is an open incident and A has an owner and a runbook is scheduled for A and a change is prepared for A and the incident ticket for A is pending and A is ready for remediation and A has a ticket scheduled for B
I can only close incident an incident case A with a change ticket B if it is not the case that the incident A is resolved
effects: Once I close incident an incident case A with a change ticket B, it is the case that the incident A is resolved

close_incident_post_execution.description: close incident post execution for an incident case A
preconditions: I can only close incident post execution for an incident case A if it is the case that the origin is verified for A and A is an open incident and A has an owner and a runbook is scheduled for A and a change is prepared for A and the incident ticket for A is pending and A is ready for remediation and A has an implementation observed
I can only close incident post execution for an incident case A if it is not the case that the incident A is resolved
effects: Once I close incident post execution for an incident case A, it is the case that the incident A is resolved

action_nl_templates.bind_alert_signature: bind alert signature {?alert_signature} to incident case {?incident_case}
action_nl_templates.unbind_alert_signature: unbind alert signature {?alert_signature} from incident case {?incident_case}

action_nl_templates.unlink_configuration_change_from_inciden: unlink configuration change {?configuration_change} from incident case {?incident_case}

action_nl_templates.unlink_suppression_rule_from_incident: unlink suppression rule {?suppression_rule} from incident case {?incident_case}

action_nl_templates.generate_mitigation_with_rollback: generate a mitigation plan with rollback for incident case {?incident_case} using mitigation runbook {?mitigation_runbook}, suppression rule {?suppression_rule}, and rollback plan {?rollback_plan}
action_nl_templates.validate_change_prerequisites: validate change prerequisites for incident case {?incident_case} using alert rule {?alert_rule} and configuration change {?configuration_change}
action_nl_templates.record_change_approval: record change approval for incident case {?incident_case} using alert rule {?alert_rule}, configuration change {?configuration_change}, and human team {?human_team}

action_nl_templates.execute_automation_playbook: execute automation playbook {?automation_playbook} for incident case {?incident_case} with alert signature {?alert_signature}
action_nl_templates.mark_ticket_pending: mark the ticket for incident case {?incident_case} as pending with alert signature {?alert_signature}
action_nl_templates.mark_ticket_pending_with_approver: mark the ticket for incident case {?incident_case} as pending with approver {?approver}
action_nl_templates.bind_change_ticket_to_incident: bind change ticket {?change_ticket} to incident case {?incident_case}
action_nl_templates.schedule_change_ticket: schedule change ticket {?change_ticket} for incident origin {?incident_origin} with incident variant {?incident_variant}
action_nl_templates.record_execution_observation: record execution observation for incident case {?incident_case} using alert signature {?alert_signature} and automation playbook {?automation_playbook}
action_nl_templates.close_incident_standard: close incident incident case {?incident_case} using standard procedure
action_nl_templates.close_incident_with_ticket: close incident incident case {?incident_case} with change ticket {?change_ticket}
action_nl_templates.close_incident_post_execution: close incident post execution for incident case {?incident_case}

predicate_nl_templates.linked_alert_rule: {?incident_case} is linked to the alert rule {?alert_rule}
predicate_nl_templates.linked_configuration_change: {?incident_case} is linked to the configuration change {?configuration_change}
predicate_nl_templates.linked_suppression_rule: {?incident_case} is linked to the suppression rule {?suppression_rule}
predicate_nl_templates.linked_mitigation_runbook: {?incident_case} is linked to the mitigation runbook {?mitigation_runbook}
predicate_nl_templates.incident_ticket_pending: the incident ticket for {?incident_case} is pending
predicate_nl_templates.origin_ticket_link: {?incident_case} has an origin ticket link to {?change_ticket}
predicate_nl_templates.signature_bound_to_incident: the signature {?alert_signature} is bound to the incident {?incident_case}

action_nl_templates_indef.assign_responder: assign a responder {?responder} to an incident case {?incident_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.unassign_responder: unassign a responder {?responder} from an incident case {?incident_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.bind_alert_signature: bind an alert signature {?alert_signature} to an incident case {?incident_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.unbind_alert_signature: unbind an alert signature {?alert_signature} from an incident case {?incident_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.escalate_signature: escalate an alert signature {?alert_signature} for an incident case {?incident_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.escalate_to_approver: escalate an incident case {?incident_case} to an approver {?approver}
action_nl_templates_indef.prepare_automation_playbook: prepare an automation playbook {?automation_playbook} for an incident case {?incident_case} with an alert signature {?alert_signature}
action_nl_templates_indef.prepare_automation_from_change_ticket: prepare automation for an incident case {?incident_case} using a change ticket {?change_ticket}
action_nl_templates_indef.link_alert_rule_to_incident: link an alert rule {?alert_rule} to an incident case {?incident_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.unlink_alert_rule_from_incident: unlink an alert rule {?alert_rule} from an incident case {?incident_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.link_configuration_change_to_incident: link a configuration change {?configuration_change} to an incident case {?incident_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.unlink_configuration_change_from_inciden: unlink a configuration change {?configuration_change} from an incident case {?incident_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.link_suppression_rule_to_incident: link a suppression rule {?suppression_rule} to an incident case {?incident_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.unlink_suppression_rule_from_incident: unlink a suppression rule {?suppression_rule} from an incident case {?incident_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.link_tag_to_incident: link a tag {?tag} to an incident case {?incident_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.unlink_tag_from_incident: unlink a tag {?tag} from an incident case {?incident_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.generate_mitigation_plan: generate a mitigation plan for an incident case {?incident_case} using a mitigation runbook {?mitigation_runbook} with an alert rule {?alert_rule} and a configuration change {?configuration_change}
action_nl_templates_indef.generate_mitigation_with_rollback: generate a mitigation plan with rollback for an incident case {?incident_case} using a mitigation runbook {?mitigation_runbook}, a suppression rule {?suppression_rule}, and a rollback plan {?rollback_plan}
action_nl_templates_indef.validate_change_prerequisites: validate change prerequisites for an incident case {?incident_case} using an alert rule {?alert_rule} and a configuration change {?configuration_change}
action_nl_templates_indef.record_change_approval: record change approval for an incident case {?incident_case} using an alert rule {?alert_rule}, a configuration change {?configuration_change}, and a human team {?human_team}
action_nl_templates_indef.record_change_approval_with_automation_i: record change approval for an incident case {?incident_case} using a suppression rule {?suppression_rule}, a tag {?tag}, and an automation identity {?automation_identity}
action_nl_templates_indef.start_implementation: start implementation for an incident case {?incident_case} using an alert rule {?alert_rule} and a configuration change {?configuration_change}
action_nl_templates_indef.execute_automation_playbook: execute an automation playbook {?automation_playbook} for an incident case {?incident_case} with an alert signature {?alert_signature}
action_nl_templates_indef.mark_ticket_pending: mark the ticket for an incident case {?incident_case} as pending with an alert signature {?alert_signature}
action_nl_templates_indef.mark_ticket_pending_with_approver: mark the ticket for an incident case {?incident_case} as pending with an approver {?approver}
action_nl_templates_indef.bind_change_ticket_to_incident: bind a change ticket {?change_ticket} to an incident case {?incident_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.schedule_change_ticket: schedule a change ticket {?change_ticket} for an incident origin {?incident_origin} with an incident variant {?incident_variant}
action_nl_templates_indef.record_execution_observation: record execution observation for an incident case {?incident_case} using an alert signature {?alert_signature} and an automation playbook {?automation_playbook}
action_nl_templates_indef.close_incident_standard: close incident an incident case {?incident_case} using standard procedure
action_nl_templates_indef.close_incident_with_ticket: close incident an incident case {?incident_case} with a change ticket {?change_ticket}
action_nl_templates_indef.close_incident_post_execution: close incident post execution for an incident case {?incident_case}

type_hierarchy: Everything that is a incident case or a responder or a mitigation runbook or a configuration change or a alert rule or a suppression rule or a alert signature or a approver or a change ticket or a automation playbook or a rollback plan or a tag or a execution context is also a object
Everything that is a human team or a automation identity is also a execution context
Everything that is a incident variant or a incident origin is also a incident case
